title: inception
body:
inception lyrics

 what i do do is my history
which just cuz i flush and wipe what i can
don't mean it don't mean shit to me
i been through and through it
i been to into it to intuit everything i been do do doin
when i get stoned or stupid i stop hearing the loop loopin
charmin
til lupin swoop in
alarmin
if we execute the exit
the meet cute is electric
the last step is splitting the fruits of the lootin
i try not to get stuck plottin my lot in the take
i still got a lot to take in playin my part
so as i was sayin i stay in the arc
even when i stray to the dark
i don't try to wake up from the dream and take it apart
i parlay with my art
lay with my back to the dirt faded and watch
so i can say what i saw without fabricating a log
and i'll shout it right now, i don't represent to the law
those cameras snatch spirits, i don't respect it all
masked up
i been inspecting the wall
checking the cracks crevices faults
learning to climb so i can find what i want
when i'm tired, i know a ledge to lie on
it's a high and wide one
i can rely on finding space on
easy to get off when i'm done resting
then it's on with the quest
i'm still lost tryin to rejoin with the rest of my tribe
scattered and pressed
and even if it wasn't wouldn't matter
we never had an address
i could just map out an access
so i been focused on learning how to connect
buildin bridges outta anything i could collect
thoughts and jetsam
flots and then some
whatever the flow brings in
i don't know what it is but i know how i get
if i can't get going cuz i won't try to stretch
or i'm outta my depth
